title: 7 Signs It's God's Voice, Not Anxiety
hook: Is it God - or just anxiety?
script: Is it God - or just anxiety? Seven signs to test in 30 seconds. 1) It aligns with Scripture - 2 Timothy 3:16. 2) It sounds like Jesus the Shepherd - truthful, gentle - John 10. 3) It brings a steady peace, not a panic countdown - Colossians 3:15. 4) It bears good fruit over time - Matthew 7. 5) It is confirmed by wise counsel - Proverbs 11:14. 6) It is humble, pure, open to reason - James 3:17. 7) It convicts without condemnation - Romans 8:1. Warning: do not cherry-pick verses or only ask people who agree with you. Breathe, pray, and ask God to align your desires to His Word. Save this for your next decision.

title: The Shepherd vs the Spiral: Hearing God in the Noise
hook: If your thoughts race at 2 a.m., listen to this.
script: If your thoughts race at 2 a.m., listen to this. Anxiety shouts now or never; God's voice guides steady and familiar. Jesus said His sheep know His voice - John 10. His leading matches Scripture - 2 Timothy 3:16 - and carries peace like an inner umpire - Colossians 3:15. Over time it grows good fruit - Matthew 7 - and welcomes wise counsel - Proverbs 11:14. It is humble and open to reason - James 3:17 - and never shames you, only lifts you with hope - Romans 8:1. Watch confirmation bias: if you need a yes, you will only hear yeses. Take 30 seconds, breathe, read one verse, and ask for a clear pause or a peaceful go.

title: A 30-Second Check to Discern God's Voice
script: You may be overthinking this. Here is a simple 30 second check. Does it align with the Bible - 2 Timothy 3:16? Does it reflect Jesus the Shepherd - John 10? Do you sense peace, not pressure - Colossians 3:15? Will it bear good fruit if you wait - Matthew 7? Do wise, godly people confirm it - Proverbs 11:14? Is it humble and pure, not hyped - James 3:17? Does it correct without condemning - Romans 8:1? If any answer is no, pause. Guard against confirmation bias: do not hunt for verses or voices that approve your plan. Pray, Lord, close the wrong doors and confirm the right one.
